nasb.text: He who assaults his father and drives his mother away Is a shameful and disgraceful son.

esv.text: He who does violence to his father and chases away his mother is a son who brings shame and reproach.

cnv.text: 虐待父親，趕走母親的， 是貽羞可恥的兒子。

ccb.text: 苛待父亲的人可鄙， 逼走母亲的人可耻。

csbs.text: 虐待父亲、赶走母亲的， 是蒙羞致辱的儿子。
